creator: ports@bsdserwis.com
text:
As you suggested I've upgraded ports tree for poudriere. And spamassassin rebuilded. So ports which depend on SA build without a problem.

That's the proof: http://pkg.bsdserwis.com/pkg/build.html?mastername=11x64-default&build=2017-10-17_22h55m43s

Thanks for your time. Bug can be closed.
